pkgmetadata.longdescription: django-htmx.. image httpsimg.shields.ioreadthedocsdjango-htmxstylefor-the-badge target httpsdjango-htmx.readthedocs.ioenlatest.. image httpsimg.shields.iogithubactionsworkflowstatusadamchainzdjango-htmxmain.ymlbranchmainstylefor-the-badge target httpsgithub.comadamchainzdjango-htmxactionsworkflowCI.. image httpsimg.shields.iobadgeCoverage-10025-successstylefor-the-badge target httpsgithub.comadamchainzdjango-htmxactionsworkflowCI.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypivdjango-htmx.svgstylefor-the-badge target httpspypi.orgprojectdjango-htmx.. image httpsimg.shields.iobadgecode20style-black-000000.svgstylefor-the-badge target httpsgithub.compsfblack.. image httpsimg.shields.iobadgepre--commit-enabled-brightgreenlogopre-commitlogoColorwhitestylefor-the-badge target httpsgithub.compre-commitpre-commit alt pre-commitExtensions for using Django with htmx httpshtmx.org__.----Want to work smarter and fasterCheck out my book Boost Your Django DX httpsadamchainz.gumroad.comlbyddx__ which covers many ways to improve your development experience.----Documentation-------------Please see httpsdjango-htmx.readthedocs.io .
